positive: A whimsical, storybook illustration of a group of forest animals (fox, bunny, owl) having a tea party in a glowing mushroom forest. Soft pastel colors, highly detailed, storybook style, digital painting, bokeh effect, volumetric lighting.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, noisy, harsh shadows
